bucket_descriptions.Vibe Coder Victor: Tech workers who dress for function and context (office, meetings, weather) and want to look intentional without overthinking it.
bucket_descriptions.Resident Rachel: Busy residents (e.g. medical, law) who need outfit decisions that fit long days and mixed contexts.
bucket_descriptions.Recently Promoted Priya: Recently promoted professionals who care about looking the part and reducing morning decision fatigue.
bucket_descriptions.Hybrid Office Owen: Hybrid workers who switch between home, office, and different dress codes and want one less decision.
bucket_descriptions.Light-Touch Styler Sam: People who want to look put-together with minimal effort and no fashion deep-dives.
